---
title: "Corrections Policy"
description: How errors are handled and corrected on this site.
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
    toc-title: "On this page"
---

I aim to keep what I publish accurate. This page describes how I handle corrections and updates.

_Last updated: 19 May 2026_

## Corrections
When a factual error is found, I correct it. Material errors — those that affect meaning or conclusions — get a note on the post stating what changed and when. Typos, broken links, and formatting fixes are made without a separate notice.

## Updates
Posts may be updated after publication for new information or clarity. Substantive changes are reflected in the post’s last-modified date where applicable.

## Opinion and analysis
Much of the content on this site represents my personal opinion, analysis, or commentary. I aim to clearly distinguish between factual claims and opinion. [My disclaimer](/disclaimer.html) applies to all content on this site.

## Reporting errors

If you spot a factual error, email [alexandre.cagnon.work@tuta.com](mailto:alexandre.cagnon.work@tuta.com) with:

- the page URL
- what seems wrong
- a source for the correct information, if you have one

I review reports promptly.

## Scope

This policy applies to content on [alexandre-cagnon.com](https://alexandre-cagnon.com), not to external sites I link to.
